feed.title: Hosted Private Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [EU/CA][Managed VMware vSphere] - VMware NSX maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 24, 07:00 UTC  -  Aug 27, 16:00 UTC

Jul 16, 06:11 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

Start time : 24/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 27/08/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : None expected, only vMotion of different VMs from one edge to another.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be upgrading our VMware NSX network infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Managed VMware vSphere] - VMware NSX maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 17, 07:00 UTC  -  Aug 20, 16:00 UTC

Jul 16, 06:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

Start time : 17/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 20/08/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : None expected, only vMotion of different VMs from one edge to another.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be upgrading our VMware NSX network infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Hosted Private Cloud] - Managed VMware vSphere maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 10, 07:00 UTC  -  Aug 13, 18:00 UTC

Jul 16, 05:54 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

Start time : 10/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 13/08/2026 18:00 UTC
Service impact : Hosts will be put in maintenance mode during the operation and a vMotion will be performed if it has virtual machines in it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

An individual communication will be done to inform customers.
Customers can reschedule the operation through the manager.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX8][Managed VMware vSphere] - Racks R805L19 / R805L20 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 15, 16:56 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering has been resolved.

Start time : 15/07/2026 14:30 UTC
End time : 15/07/2026 15:54 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 15, 14:40 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :

Start time : 15/07/2026 14:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some hosts are temporarily unavailable in Racks R805L19 / R805L20.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident to fix it. 

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX2A/B/D][Managed VMware vSphere] - Rack R831B25 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 9, 14:40 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering in RBX2A/B/D regions has been resolved.

Start time : 09/07/2026 12:35 UTC
End time : 09/07/2026 13:50 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 13:51 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 09/07/2026 13:50 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 12:35 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All hosts were temporarily unavailable in Rack R831B25.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 13:25 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offer on the specific rack R831B25.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 12:35 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All hosts are temporarily unavailable in Rack R831B25.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 9, 13:06 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering, which is causing temporary issue in the rack R831B25.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 12:35 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All hosts are temporarily unavailable in Rack R831B25.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG][VMware Private Cloud] - Cluster 3049 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 9, 07:49 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Public VMware Cloud Foundation offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/07/2026 07:24 UTC
End time : 09/07/2026 07:42 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster3049 was temporarily unreachable.
Customers Impact : Customers were unable to access their datastores in Cluster7420.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [RBX2A][Managed VMware vSphere] - Cluster9151/Cluster9152 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 7, 05:18 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering on Cluster9151 and Cluster9152 has been resolved.

Start time : 07/07/2026 04:45 UTC
End time : 07/07/2026 05:12 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by this maintenance : https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/7yv3swvkhb86

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 05:08 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering, which is causing temporary issue in Cluster9151 and Cluster9152.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 07/07/2026 04:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster9151 and Cluster9152 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data located in the specified clusters.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX2a][Managed VMware vSphere] - Cluster9098/9110/9125 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 3, 05:08 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering has been resolved.

Start time : 03/07/2026 04:40 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 05:05 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 3, 05:00 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the Cluster9098 - 9110 - 9125.

Here are some supplementary details :
Start time : 03/07/2026 04:40 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster 9098 - 9125 is temporarily unavailable. The Cluster9110 was temporarily unavailable between 03/07/2026 04:50 UTC and 03/07/2026 04:55 UTC.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data located in the specified clusters.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
